hero.kicker: Boutique IT studio · Websites + Telegram bots

trust: Local integrations — every project, out of the box

services.lead: Most engagements blend two or more. Same senior engineers from first call to launch night.
services.s1_desc: UZ/RU/EN trilingual out of the box. Click and Payme right in checkout. No WordPress template — Astro or Next.js, every pixel written for you.
services.s2_desc: 1C, Excel and Payme transactions — in one system. An alternative to amoCRM/Bitrix24, built around your real process, not generic SaaS.
services.s3_desc: 50% of orders in Uzbekistan come through Telegram. We automate that channel: order capture, Click/Payme right in the bot, CRM sync, mini-app. Round-the-clock sales — without staff in the loop.
services.s3_f1: Click · Payme right in the bot
services.s4_desc: Click, Payme and Uzum BNPL — all out of the box. Telegram bot for automatic order capture. 90% of transactions are mobile — we build mobile-first.
services.s4_f1: Click · Payme · Uzum BNPL out of the box

work.c1_desc: From spreadsheets to a CRM with two-way 1C sync, in 9 weeks. 12 years of legacy data migrated without losing a row.

faq.q1: Do you work with Click, Payme and other UZ payment systems?
faq.a1: Yes — by default. Click, Payme, Uzcard, Humo, Uzum BNPL and Stripe are built into every project at no extra charge. Our payment modules are an in-house library — they connect in days, not weeks.
faq.a2: Yes. Our CRM solutions sync two-way with 1C in real time. Your accounting team doesn't have to enter anything by hand. It's the most common integration we ship.
faq.q3: How long does a project take and is the price fixed?
faq.a3: Marketing site — 4 to 6 weeks. CRM — 8 to 14. Mobile app — 10 to 16. After the discovery call we give a written SOW with a fixed price — no surprises later.
faq.q4: Do you only work in Tashkent?
faq.a4: No. We have 47 clients across Tashkent, Dubai and Almaty. Projects can be fully remote — daily Slack/Telegram contact.
faq.q5: Do you use WordPress or any templates?
faq.a5: No. Every project is written from scratch — Astro, Next.js, React Native or your stack. Templates break after 6 months — we write code that runs for years.
faq.a6: Yes. 30 days of post-launch support is included in every project — bug fixes, observability, hotfixes. Beyond that — retainer (monthly support) or SLA contract.
faq.q7: Do you build Telegram bots? And Mini Apps?
faq.a7: Telegram bots are one of our core services. Order-taking bots, Click/Payme right in the bot, CRM/1C sync, Mini Apps, admin panels. Bots usually ship in 2–4 weeks. Order a website and bot together — bundled discount applies.

cta.lead: Tell us about your team, your timeline, and the problem you're trying to solve. We respond within 3 hours during studio hours.
